title: TNPSC – CTS Exam (Non - Interview Posts) – 461 Posts

basic_details.job_title: TNPSC CTS (Non - Interview Posts) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 461 Posts
basic_details.short_information: TNPSC Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest TNPSC recruitment notification 2026 for 461 CTS Exam (Non - Interview Posts). Apply online from 27 May 2026 to 25 June 2026 through the official TNPSC career portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC), Chennai
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via www.tnpscexams.in (One Time Registration + Online Application)

age_limit.age_details: 55 years (most posts); No Maximum Age Limit for many posts

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Lib, Any Post Graduate, M.Sc, M.Phil/Ph.D

selection_process: Single Stage Written Examination (Paper I + Paper II) → Onscreen Certificate Verification → Physical Certificate Verification / Counselling (where applicable)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through www.tnpscexams.in. Candidates must first register under One Time Registration (OTR) on the Commission's website and then proceed to fill the online application separately for this examination. The application link will be live from 27-05-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last minute.
